


left side of the page and is a scrollable
----------------------------------------
                search ______________________    [Add product]

Filter
sort By 
    default
    price low to high
    price high to low
    rating
    discount 
    newest
    oldest
vender
    all
    ---names of vendors from /api/vendor/all get
ratings    
    1 star
    2 star
    3 star
    4 star
    5 star
catagory
    all
    --names of all catagory from /api/category/all get
price range
    min price _______________
    max price _______________

-------------------------------

body of the page and right side 
-------------------------------------
    ------------------                      ------------------
    |          |    |          |
    |  product image |                    |  product image |
    |                |                    |                |
    ------------------                      ------------------
    name     price/price-discount unit      name     price/price-discount unit
    brand name                              brand name
    short Description                       short Description
    vendor name                             vendor name
    rating                                  rating
                              
    ------------------                      ------------------
    ------------------                      ------------------
    |          |    |          |
    |  product image |                    |  product image |
    |                |                    |                |
    ------------------                      ------------------
    name     price/price-discount unit      name     price/price-discount unit
    brand name                              brand name
    short Description                       short Description
    vendor name                             vendor name
    rating                                  rating
                              
    ------------------                      ------------------



        prev <--- 1 2 3 ... N ---> next
-------------------------------------

- after clicking on the card move to product details page
